name: soil-detector
description: An AI-powered digital twin of soil that helps farmers decide what to grow, connect with others, rent equipment, and sell crops—all in one platform.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp index.html style.css script.js manifest.webmanifest service-worker.js dist/ && cp -r assets dist/
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android: npm run sync && npx cap open android
scripts.ios: npm run sync && npx cap open ios
